products.scene_direction: {"scene": "Empty professional recording studio interior at golden hour", "style": "cinematic product photography, shot on Canon 5D Mark IV, 35mm lens, f/2.8", "color_palette": ["#B01020", "#C8A96E", "#1A1A1A", "#F5E6C8"], "lighting": "warm amber side lighting raking across smooth hardwood floor, single window with golden hour glow, long soft shadows", "mood": "intimate, warm, timeless", "background": "smooth hardwood floor surface, dark studio wall, warm ambient glow", "composition": "wide horizontal, empty foreground with space on right for product placement", "camera": {"angle": "low angle, 18 inches from floor", "lens": "35mm", "depth_of_field": "sharp floor, soft background"}}

{"scene": "Edge of a concert stage looking into a vast dark arena, crowd visible in distance", "style": "cinematic concert photography, shot on Sony A7IV, 24mm lens, f/1.8", "color_palette": ["#B01020", "#0A0A0A", "#4A6FA5", "#E8E8E8"], "lighting": "dramatic backlight in deep crimson #B01020 and cool blue, haze particles catching light, stage edge lit from below", "mood": "epic, electrifying, aspirational", "background": "black stage floor, atmospheric haze, blurred crowd lights, vast empty arena darkness", "composition": "wide shot, stage floor in foreground, arena receding to horizon, space on left for product", "camera": {"angle": "low angle, floor level", "lens": "24mm wide", "depth_of_field": "sharp stage floor, bokeh crowd lights"}}
